data.title: As a project onboarder, I get version.file_path and stack populated from detection
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Extend onboarding Phase 3 Step 2b config template to include version.file_path (from project-detect.sh version_files) and stack (from detect-stack.sh output). When version_files contains 2+ paths, present a numbered selection; write only the selected repo-root-relative path.
**Why**: These detection-backed keys are available from project-detect.sh but not consumed by Phase 3 config generation.
**Scope**:
- IN: SKILL.md Phase 3 Step 2b config template extension for version.file_path and stack; numbered selection for multi-value version_files; repo-root-relative path resolution
- OUT: Changes to project-detect.sh or detect-stack.sh; version bumping behavior; resolve-stack-adapter.sh changes

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, onboarding Phase 3 Step 2b generates version.file_path and stack in dso-config.conf, populated from project-detect.sh output
  ← Satisfies: "SC1 — detection-backed keys in config template"
- When this story is complete, projects with 2+ detected version files see a numbered selection and only the chosen repo-root-relative path is written to version.file_path
  ← Satisfies: "SC4 — version_files disambiguation"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] version_files may be empty or absent — omit version.file_path with explanatory comment when no version files detected
- [Reliability] Paths must be repo-root-relative, not bare filenames — resolve before writing
- [Maintainability] All SKILL.md stories modify the same file — sequential execution recommended
